name: WarPigs Craft Kitchen
tagline: Slow-smoked craft BBQ from Sonoma County
seoDescription: WarPigs Craft Kitchen in Cotati, CA serves 12-hour smoked meats, scratch-made sides, and full-service catering rooted in Modern Americana comfort food.

hero.heading: 12-Hour Smoked Meats, Made the Hard Way
hero.subheading: Pitmaster Larry Hillix has been slow-smoking craft barbecue for Sonoma County since 2011.

highlights: Smoked low and slow up to 12 hours

about.heading: About WarPigs Craft Kitchen
body: In 2011, owner and pitmaster Larry Hillix decided Sonoma County was ready for War Pigs BBQ, building a craft kitchen on a special blend of spices and rubs inspired by Gary Park of G's Slow Smoked BBQ. The idea was simple: pair real precision and quality with the familiar flavors of hanging out with family around the grill.

Today WarPigs is a Northern California craft kitchen drawing on classic American comfort food, Southern smokehouse tradition, and seasonal California ingredients. Beyond the kitchen they cater corporate events, weddings, and private gatherings, and regularly host pop-ups with local breweries, wineries, and community venues.

services.title: 12-Hour Smoked Pulled Pork Sandwich
services.description: Crispy pork bark and velvety shreds on toasted brioche, finished with tangy red sauce.

services.title: Dirty Fries
services.description: Fries piled with cheese, BBQ sauce, pulled pork, and coleslaw.

services.title: Smoked Meats
services.description: Brisket, ribs, smoked chicken wings, and house-made sausage.

services.title: Scratch-Made Sides
services.description: Fried Brussels sprouts, onion rings, and house coleslaw.

services.title: Full-Service Catering
services.description: Custom menus for weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings across Sonoma County.

items.quote: The bbq pork sandwich was perfect. The sides are great as well.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

items.a: You'll find us at 8492 Gravenstein Hwy.
We proudly serve Cotati, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at +17075085551 — we're glad to help.
